title: pilosella aurantiaca subsp. subaurantiaca
intro: Pilosella aurantiaca subsp. subaurantiaca, also known as a subspecies of the Hawkweed plant, is a perennial herb native to certain parts of Europe. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, attributed to the presence of sesquiterpene lactones. The health benefits of Pilosella aurantiaca subsp. subaurantiaca include its potential to reduce inflammation and alleviate symptoms associated with various health conditions, such as digestive issues and skin problems. The plant is typically used in herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat a range of health issues.
